case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CASTANEDA, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, RICHARD CASTANEDA, LOURDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, LOURDES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, RICHARD
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-12-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF TO RESERVE RICHARD CASTANEDA & FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.LOURDES CASTANEDA DOES NOT NEED TO APPEAR ON 1/12/00.IF THERE IS A VALID PROOF
OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO RICHARD CASTANEDA FOR THE 1/12/00 HEARING, THE COURT WILL EITHER DECIDE THE CASE OR CONTINUE FOR LOURDES
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-12-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-01-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLFT TO SERVE RICHARD CASTANEDA & FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. LOURDES CASTANEDA DOES NOT NEED TO APPEAR ON 5/3/00. IF THERE IS A VALID POS, ON FILE AS TO
RICHARD CASTANEDA FOR THE 5/3/00 HEARING, THE COURT WILL EITHER DECIDE THE CASE OR CONTINUE FOR LOURDES CASTANEDA TO APPEAR.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-03-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE TO CASTANEDA RICHARD WAS FILED. SUBSTITUTED SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, RICHARD CASTANEDA, LOURDES $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,051.00, LOURDES CASTANEDA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
